ItacPersonItem.Notes: Martelli moved to Padua before 1542 to study law. In the Infiammati Academy, he delivered two presentations: a comment on Petrarch`s canzone `Chiare, fresche e dolci acque`, and a lecture on Bembo`s sonnet `Piansi e cantai lo stratio e l’aspra guerra` (on Sunday, 19 September 1540). See his biography by V. Bramanti in DBI. He was also member of the Accademia fiorentina.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
